data.body: Pulled into the escalated design per finding #4 (change 664: circular verify — expected values sourced from the stored record). Added the verify-side authoritative-input rule + 2 ACs (recompute material from authoritative state; verify-then-extract + ancestry/era constraints on merged_log_commit). Uniform with ee0b's produce-side rule; see the epic's 'Verify-side authoritative-input rule' bullet. Change 664 needs a new patchset before 4214 closes.
